title: Create /verify-email holding screen
description: Create verify-email.html — the page users see immediately after signing up. It reassures them a verification email is on its way and provides next-step guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Page displays a mail/envelope icon or illustration
Body copy reads: 'We've sent a verification link to [email]. Click the link to activate your account.'
The [email] placeholder is populated dynamically from the URL query param ?email= or sessionStorage
A 'Resend email' button is present (TASK-016 wires it up)
A 'Wrong email?' link navigates back to /signup

steps.description: Create verify-email.html with shared card layout
steps.details: Reuse the card container and CSS from signup.html. Add envelope SVG icon (inline or from /icons/).

steps.description: Add Resend and Wrong email? links
steps.details: Wrong email? Go back
